responsibilities: • prepare and file gst returns and reconciliations   • advise on gst applicability and classification   • handle gst notice s, audits, and assessments   • assist in gst registrations and amendments   • reconcile gst data with books and returns   • ensure compliance with gst laws and timelines
qualifications: • chartered accountant   • strong gst law and compliance knowledge   • attention to  detail and analytical skills
